title: Mission to Exis Station
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Mission |prev=[[Mission to Bast Castle]] |conc= |next=[[Capture of the Warlord|Battle of Kariek]] |image=[[File:AnakinSoloVsOrloc-KenobisBlade.jpg]] |name=Mission to Exis Station |conflict=[[Orloc|Mage Orloc Crisis]] |objective= |date=[[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]] |place=[[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]] |result=[[New Jedi Order]] victory |side1=New Jedi Order |side2=[[Orloc]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*1 [[Jedi historian]] **[[Tionne Solusar]] *1 [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] **[[Ikrit]] *3 [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi trainees]] **[[Anakin Solo]] **[[Tahiri Veila]] **[[Uldir Lochett]] *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] |ppl2=*[[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] *[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|It's not fair. We're the students. We're the ones who need those lessons. I'm ready to learn more right now.''"
"''There are lots of other ways to study until Master Skywalker gets back. After that, I'm sure we'll get plenty of chances to have lessons from the Holocron|[[Uldir Lochett]] and [[Tahiri Veila]]|''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''}} The '''Mission to Exis Station''' was a mission by a team of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] under [[Tionne Solusar]] and [[Ikrit]] to [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. Its primary objective was to retrieve the Jedi trainee [[Uldir Lochett]]—who had joined Mage [[Orloc]] since he believed that the Mage would be able to awaken [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] [[Force power/Legends|powers]] within him and access the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Asli Krimsan]]'s [[Asli Krimsan's holocron|holocron]];tasks which nobody at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] had been able to do so. Uldir then stole Ikrit's ship [[Sunrider (starship)|''Sunrider'']] and the two Jedi artifacts recovered during the previous [[Mission to Bast Castle|adventure]] at [[Bast Castle]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]— [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] lightsaber and the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] of the ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Asli Krimsan]]. Having arrived at the derelict space city, Uldir found Orloc whom took the youth as his student. The Mage had already set up his base on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and planned to create his own [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. In reality, Orloc had no [[The Force/Legends|Force powers]] but had actually used high-tech gimmicks to deceive others with demonstrations of so called "Force power." Uldir did not realize it. [[New Jedi Order]] historian [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]], Master [[Ikrit]], the droid [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and Jedi trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] set out to find Uldir on their transport [[Jemlaat-class in-system sail yacht|''Jemlaat''-class yacht]]. Having arrived at the ancient [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]], they tried to convince Uldir that he had been deceived by Mage Orloc. The Mage attacked the four Jedi with his high-tech gimmicks and his [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] mercenaries and servant droids. However, the Jedi fought back by using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. During the duel, Tionne was wounded and Ikrit—who had sworn not to wield a lightsaber until he had found worthy students—made his decision and joined Anakin and Tahiri in their fight. Uldir then saw that Orloc was little more than a charlatan who used technological gimmiks to deceive others with demonstrations of power. Together, the Jedi defeated Orloc who disappeared and was never heard of again. Successful in their mission, the Jedi returned to the Praxeum with a triumphant Lochett and the two recovered [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifacts]]. ==History== ===Background=== Earlier, a Jedi [[Mission to Bast Castle|mission]] to [[Bast Castle]] on the remote [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] led by [[Jedi historian]] [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]] had recovered two [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifacts]]—the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]-era [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]] survivor [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. However, during the mission, the Jedi had encountered a "Mage" [[Orloc]]—a former [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent and false [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophet of the Dark Side]] who had survived a massacre by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]]. Claiming to have [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]], the Mage sparred with the Jedi team before disappearing into a trap door{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/indexp2.html|text=''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''|int=Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties}} The Jedi team then returned to the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] [[File:Exis_EGttF.jpg|thumb|left|240px|Exis Station]] When Tionne and her team returned to the Jedi Praxeum with Kenobi's blade and Krimsan's holocron, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] welcomed her back, but he soon had to leave on another mission to investigate the whereabouts of the Jedi expedition [[Outbound Flight]] which was rumored to have ended up in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' While waiting for Skywalker to return, Tionne decided to reward Anakin Solo, Tahiri Veila, and Uldir Lochett for helping her retrieve the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] by letting them watch while she began to explore its secrets. Activating the device, Tionne asked the [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]] to speak about herself. The gatekeeper told the Jedi about Asli Krimsan and the purpose the holocron had been constructed for. In doing so, she mentioned the Jedi library on [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]], which Tionne then asked about, and the device projected a hologram of what the ancient library used to look like. Lochett mentioned that the Mage Orloc was from Exis Station. Tionne was surprised and put down the holocron to question Lochett, deciding not to access Krimsan's holocron again until Skywalker returned, since the gatekeeper had mentioned that it was intended for the use of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]]. Instead, she placed both the holocron and Obi-Wan Kenobi's lightsaber in Skywalker's quarters. Lochett, who wished to become a Jedi but was not [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], thought Krimsan's holocron could help him in his quest. During the night, he crept into Skywalker's empty quarters and tried to access the holocron. Unable to do so, he decided to steal both Jedi artifacts and go to Exis Station to see if the mysterious Orloc could teach him how to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. To reach Exis Station, Lochett stole the [[Sunrider (starship)|''Sunrider'']], a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] belonging to Jedi Master [[Ikrit]]. In the morning, his friends discovered that he and the ''Sunrider'' were missing. While they immediately suspected he had gone to Exis Station, the Jedi spent the rest of the day searching the grounds of the Praxeum for him. When Lochett did not turn up, Tionne, Ikrit, Solo, Veila, and R2-D2 traveled to Exis Station on Tionne's vessel, the ''[[Lore Seeker]]'', to retrieve him. ===Confrontation at Exis Station=== As soon as Uldir Lochett arrived on Exis Station, he was captured by [[Ranat/Legends|Ranats]] working for Orloc. They threw a sack over his head, injected him with a drug to render him unconscious, and carried him further into the station. The Ranats brought him to Orloc, who questioned him. Lochett then offered Orloc Krimsan's holocron and Obi-Wan Kenobi's lightsaber in exchange for teaching him magic. The Mage suspected a trap by the Jedi, but accepted Lochett as his student. When Orloc was given Krimsan's holocron in return, he unsuccessfully attempted to activate it. To disguise his failure, he claimed to Lochett that his own powers were far greater than the teachings of the Jedi. He told Lochett to concentrate on light, and the lights on the station dimmed. Encouraged by his apparent success, Lochett eagerly sought further instruction. Soon, Lochett's friends arrived on the station to rescue him and retrieve the stolen Jedi artifacts. Anakin Solo and Tahiri Veila observed Lochett training with Orloc from an air duct grating high above the Mage and his pupil. However, their combined weight caused the pair to fall from the ceiling into the midst of Orloc and his Ranat and [[Droid/Legends|droid]] servants. Tionne and Ikrit jumped down from the ceiling to follow the children and [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetically]] confiscated Krimsan's holocron and Kenobi's lightsaber. Furious, Orloc set his minions on the Jedi team, and the Jedi fled with the artifacts through a series of corridors into Orloc's control room. Orloc's forces engaged them there, and the Mage used his technological devices to unleash driving wind, steam jets, [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] enemies, and other hazards on the Jedi. During the fight, the Jedi lost possession of Krimsan's holocron while Tionne was wounded. With Solo, Veila and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] fighting alone against Orloc's Ranat henchmen, droids and gimmicks, Ikrit—who had sworn not to wield a lightsaber until he had found worthy students—made his decision and entered the fight. Seeing true Jedi in action, Lochett joined the fight on the side of the Jedi and retrieved Krimsan's holocron from the floor. He tossed it to Veila, and it activated at her touch. The holocron projected an image of Asli Krimsan that filled the entire room. This helped Anakin Solo see past Orloc's holograms to reach the Mage. Solo then destroyed the devices on Orloc's costume that controlled most of his mechanical wonders. Using his last trick, Orloc produced a puff of smoke to distract the Jedi and escape. Krimsan's holocron and Kenobi's lightsaber where returned to the Jedi Praxeum, where the latter was later studied in depth by Tionne while the former's design was utilized by future Jedi apprentices including Anakin Solo and his older sister [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]].[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] ==Appearances== *''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Exis Station, Mission to}} [[Category:Battles in the Auril sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Mage Orloc crisis]] [[Category:Duels]]
